_doc: Beta stress-test prompt suite. Each prompt is run through the SAME create_design path the browser/API uses (see tests/test_beta_stress.py). The outcome must be in the prompt's 'allow' list if present, otherwise the category default set below. The test ALSO enforces global trust invariants for EVERY prompt regardless of category: (1) the outcome is always one of the six safe states, (2) a generated_* outcome must have exports AND must not be a critical_failure (no false PASS), (3) a failed_safe/unsupported/critical outcome must NOT offer a downloadable manufacturable export, (4) generation never raises / never 500s. NOTE on provider: CI runs the offline mock provider, so a few single-part families that depend on the LLM (shaft / coupler / some flanges) fall back to needs_clarification here rather than building — that is a SAFE state, not a false pass, and is recorded in each prompt's 'allow'. Concept-CAD families (hammer/wrench/pliers/etc.) build a simplified concept solid by design. Categories: single_part, vague, assembly, unsupported, adversarial.
